steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: The first clause has a plural subject “These minuscule animals.” The blank must serve as the subject pronoun of the second independent clause following “and.”

steps.title: Apply pronoun-antecedent agreement
steps.content: ”They” is plural and matches the plural antecedent, as required by pronoun-antecedent agreement. The other choices are singular (it, he) or non-standard (that). That confirms C is correct.
